a_share_breadth.name: A-share Market Breadth
a_share_breadth.description: Advance-decline and participation proxy for A-shares. Broad participation is stronger confirmation than index-only movement.

a_share_turnover.name: A-share Turnover
a_share_turnover.description: A-share market turnover confirms whether policy expectations are converting into market participation.

ai_capex_news.name: AI Capex News
ai_capex_news.description: Structured AI capital expenditure and infrastructure demand events. This can affect US mega-cap technology, semiconductors, cloud, and China-linked AI sectors.

ai_computer_breadth.name: AI and Computer Breadth
ai_computer_breadth.description: Participation breadth inside the sector. Sector context: AI and computer ETFs depend on AI infrastructure spending, software demand, policy procurement, and growth-stock liquidity.

ai_computer_etf_flow.name: AI and Computer ETF Flow
ai_computer_etf_flow.description: Direct ETF share, AUM, or estimated net-flow evidence for the sector. Sector context: AI and computer ETFs depend on AI infrastructure spending, software demand, policy procurement, and growth-stock liquidity.

ai_computer_fundamental_proxy.name: AI and Computer Fundamental Proxy
ai_computer_fundamental_proxy.description: Sector-specific proxy for earnings, supply-demand, orders, inventory, or policy transmission. Sector context: AI and computer ETFs depend on AI infrastructure spending, software demand, policy procurement, and growth-stock liquidity.

ai_computer_leader_confirmation.name: AI and Computer Leader Confirmation
ai_computer_leader_confirmation.description: Confirmation from leading sector constituents. Sector context: AI and computer ETFs depend on AI infrastructure spending, software demand, policy procurement, and growth-stock liquidity.

ai_computer_policy_news.name: AI and Computer Policy News
ai_computer_policy_news.description: Structured policy or regulatory news affecting expectations for the sector. Sector context: AI and computer ETFs depend on AI infrastructure spending, software demand, policy procurement, and growth-stock liquidity.

ai_computer_relative_strength.name: AI and Computer Relative Strength
ai_computer_relative_strength.description: Sector performance relative to broad A-shares or CSI 300. Sector context: AI and computer ETFs depend on AI infrastructure spending, software demand, policy procurement, and growth-stock liquidity.

brokerage_breadth.description: Participation breadth inside the sector. Sector context: Brokerage ETFs are sensitive to market turnover, margin financing, IPO and refinancing policy, and expectations for a stronger equity cycle.

brokerage_etf_flow.name: Brokerage ETF Flow

btc_etf_flow.name: Bitcoin Spot ETF Flow
btc_etf_flow.description: Net flow into spot Bitcoin ETFs. This is a key bridge from traditional finance into BTC demand.

btc_price_momentum.name: BTC Price Momentum
btc_price_momentum.description: BTC short-term price momentum proxy. This confirms market action and should not be confused with BTC ETF flow.

buyback_activity.name: US Buyback Activity
buyback_activity.description: Corporate repurchase activity proxy. Buybacks can be an important structural source of demand for US equities.

china_policy_news.name: China Policy News
china_policy_news.description: Structured China policy events affecting liquidity, equity-market support, credit conditions, or sector direction. News remains an observation and does not directly set pool scores.

china_social_financing.name: China Social Financing
china_social_financing.description: Measures China's broad credit impulse. It is an upstream node for A-shares and China-linked markets.

cny_fx_pressure.name: CNY FX Pressure
cny_fx_pressure.description: Proxy for RMB depreciation pressure and cross-border risk appetite. Higher pressure can reduce A-share and Hong Kong equity inflow.

credit_spread.description: US credit spread proxy. Wider spreads usually indicate weaker risk appetite and tighter funding conditions.

defense_military_relative_strength.description: Sector performance relative to broad A-shares or CSI 300. Sector context: Defense ETFs are influenced by orders, fiscal defense spending, geopolitics, and state-owned asset restructuring expectations.

dr007_shibor.name: DR007 / SHIBOR Funding Cost
dr007_shibor.description: China interbank funding-cost proxy. Higher funding cost is usually negative for equity liquidity, so graph edges should generally use an inverse transform.

dxy.name: US Dollar Index
dxy.description: Dollar strength affects global liquidity, commodities, Bitcoin, gold, and non-US risk assets. Direction is edge-specific.

equal_weight_vs_cap_weight.name: Equal-Weight vs Cap-Weight S&P 500
equal_weight_vs_cap_weight.description: Relative performance of equal-weight S&P 500 versus cap-weight S&P 500. Improvement suggests healthier breadth beyond mega-cap leaders.

etf_total_flow_a_share.name: A-share Equity ETF Total Flow
etf_total_flow_a_share.description: Total A-share equity ETF share or estimated net-flow change. This is direct evidence that fund capital is entering or leaving the A-share ETF market.

fed_policy_news.name: Fed Policy News
fed_policy_news.description: Structured Fed policy events affecting discount rates, liquidity expectations, and US equity risk appetite.

geopolitical_risk_news.name: Geopolitical Risk News
geopolitical_risk_news.description: Structured news node for geopolitical risk. Future NLP should emit direction, impact, credibility, duration, and confirmation needs.

gold_etf_flow.name: Gold ETF Flow
gold_etf_flow.description: Physically-backed gold ETF flows indicate investment demand for gold.

ipo_refinancing_pressure.description: Equity financing supply pressure from IPOs, placements, and refinancing. Higher supply can drain the A-share pond, so edges should usually use an inverse transform.

m1_m2_gap.name: China M1-M2 Gap
m1_m2_gap.description: Proxy for the strength of transaction money relative to broad money. Improvement may support A-share risk appetite and cyclical rotation.

margin_balance.name: A-share Margin Financing Balance
margin_balance.description: A-share margin financing proxy. Moderate expansion can confirm risk appetite; extreme expansion should later be handled by a nonlinear overheating rule.

mega_cap_earnings.name: US Mega-Cap Earnings Confirmation
mega_cap_earnings.description: Earnings confirmation from the largest S&P 500 constituents. Important because cap-weighted S&P 500 ETF exposure is concentrated in mega-cap leaders.

sp500_breadth.name: S&P 500 Breadth
sp500_breadth.description: Participation breadth inside the S&P 500, such as percent of members above moving averages or advance-decline metrics.

sp500_eps_revision.name: S&P 500 EPS Revision
sp500_eps_revision.description: S&P 500 earnings forecast revision proxy. Upward revisions support equity returns through expected cash-flow improvement.

sp500_etf_flow.name: S&P 500 ETF Flow
sp500_etf_flow.description: Estimated net flow or share change for S&P 500 ETFs such as SPY, VOO, and IVV. This is direct ETF demand evidence.

sp500_valuation.name: S&P 500 Valuation Pressure
sp500_valuation.description: Valuation pressure proxy, such as forward P/E relative to history and rates. Higher valuation pressure should usually use an inverse transform.

stablecoin_supply.name: Stablecoin Supply
stablecoin_supply.description: Stablecoin supply is a proxy for crypto-native liquidity available to buy crypto assets.

treasury_10y_yield.name: US 10Y Treasury Yield
treasury_10y_yield.description: US 10-year Treasury yield proxy. Higher yields often pressure equity valuations, especially long-duration growth exposure.

us_real_rate.name: US Real Rate
us_real_rate.description: US real rates affect discount rates and opportunity costs. Direction is defined by edges, not by code.

usd_liquidity.name: USD Liquidity
usd_liquidity.description: Proxy for global dollar liquidity. Future versions may combine Fed balance sheet, TGA, RRP, USD M2, and BIS dollar credit.

user_holdings_input.name: User Holdings Input
user_holdings_input.description: A pluggable input node for user holdings. Future uploads can map positions to pools and assets without changing core code.

vix.name: VIX
vix.description: VIX is a risk-appetite and risk-off proxy. It can affect equities, BTC, gold, and cross-asset rotation through configured edges.

a_share.name: A-share Pool
a_share.description: Tracks mainland China equities. It receives upstream influence from domestic credit, policy, RMB exchange rate, turnover, margin balance, and ETF flows.

contributors.description: China credit improvement is upstream liquidity for A-shares.
China policy news affects expectations, but still enters as a node observation rather than a direct pool override.
A-share equity ETF flow is direct evidence of capital entering the domestic ETF market.
Turnover confirms that expectations are becoming actual market participation.
Improving transaction money relative to broad money can support domestic equity participation.
Broad participation confirms that the A-share move is not only index-level concentration.
Equity issuance and refinancing pressure can drain available capital from the A-share pond.
Higher interbank funding cost can reduce A-share liquidity.
RMB depreciation pressure can weaken equity risk appetite and foreign capital willingness.
Rising margin financing can confirm risk appetite before extreme overheating logic is added.

a_share.explanation: A-share Pool: score 0.22. Top contributors: china_social_financing via cny_credit: 0.10; china_policy_news via policy_expectation: 0.06; etf_total_flow_a_share via fund_flow: 0.05.
